title: December 24th, 2021
body:
record these lyrics

tell em, i'm not doom
quit trying to mask me but don't even [ask](ask) me
i see through it
know you're trying to master me
but i got one take
can't waste tape backtracking
who real enough for that habit
you'll feel better soon as you get you can't have it
i do. i'm out here backpacking
light foot
light touch
light eyed when it's light out
dim as the sun descends
from the crown to the deep end
it all depends what time it is
see friends, time is relative
which as we all know means you can't tell it shit
which asshole's it being, mean or intelligent
i put space between us and suck at long distances
i'm saying this plain as i can
not a bit of embellishment
just cuz you can't tell what the rhythm is don't mean i aint killing it
i promise i'm laying traps with these bars
no going back now, you won't get that far
before you notice you don't know where you are
come follow me
can't see where i'm going but the bumps don't bother me
the way i figure it's all part of the equation
i never could leave the same way i came in
i'm fated, faded, fadin
i can walk on clouds but they keep evaporating
so i get down til dawn
then i'm fadin, faded, fated
when the fog clears i wake up to see what i'm facin
sun's too bright for my eyes i shade em
then if i see a step i take it
when i need to rest i do
i don't need to stress
i'll make it when i do
the path is right there in front of you
you don't need to take it, it'll come to you
check your souls, these is bloody shoes
exclusive run, unrefundable

#twitter feed

cancelled
